case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MILA FEAUAI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEAUAI, MILA FEAUAI, LEUSU THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1534 SUNNYDALE AVE. S.F. CA. 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FEAUAI, MILA FEAUAI, LEUSU DOES 1 10 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
